18 million (Live + Same Day via Nielsen ratings){{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/golden-globes-reaches-18-million-total-viewers/ |title=Golden Globes Reaches 18 Million Total Viewers |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=January 15, 2026 |access-date=January 18, 2026}} | last = [[82nd Golden Globes|82nd]] | next = [[84th Golden Globes|84th]] }} The '''83rd Golden Globes''' was an awards ceremony that honored [[2025 in film|excellence in film]] and [[2025 in American television|American television productions of 2025]]. The winners were unveiled during the live telecast, airing on [[CBS]] and streaming on [[Paramount+]] on January 11, 2026, at [[the Beverly Hilton]].{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/the-83rd-annual-golden-globes-to-air-sunday-january-11-2026-on-cbs-hosted-by-nikki-glaser/ |title=The 83rd Annual Golden Globes to Air Sunday, January 11, 2026, on CBS, Hosted by Nikki Glaser |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=April 24, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/lists/golden-globes-2026-winners-one-battle-after-another/ |title=Golden Globes 2026 Winners: 'One Battle After Another' Earns 4 Awards, 'Adolescence' Leads TV |last1=Lang |first1=Brent |last2=Moreau |first2=Jordan |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 11, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://deadline.com/lists/golden-globes-2026-winners-list/ |title='Hamnet' & 'One Battle After Another' Take Top Film Prizes at Golden Globes – Full Winners List |last=Pedersen |first=Erik |work=[[Deadline Hollywood]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 11, 2026}} [[Nikki Glaser]] returned to host for the second consecutive year.{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/nikki-glaser-returns-to-host-83rd-golden-globes/ |title=Nikki Glaser Returns to Host 83rd Golden Globes |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=March 13, 2025 |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/nikki-glaser-ready-for-round-2-of-hosting-her-greatest-and-hardest-job-ever-the-golden-globes/ |title=Nikki Glaser Ready for Round 2 of Hosting Her 'Greatest' Marshall]] and [[Marlon Wayans]].{{cite web |url=https://deadline.com/2025/12/marlon-wayans-skye-p-marshall-golden-globe-nominations-1236634219/ |title=Marlon Wayans & Skye P. |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2025/film/awards/golden-globes-2026-nominations-1236601172/ |title=Golden Globes 2026 Nominations: 'One Battle After Another' Tops Films with Nine Nods, 'White Lotus' Leads TV with Six |last1=Lang |first1=Brent |last2=Moreau |first2=Jordan |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}} For the first time, the Globes honored [[podcast]]s in the [[Golden Globe Award for Best Podcast|Best Podcast]] category.{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/golden-globes-breaks-ground-with-new-podcast-award/ |title=Golden Globes Breaks Ground with New Podcast Award |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=May 7, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2025/awards/news/golden-globes-best-podcast-nominations-alex-cooper-amy-poehler-smartless-1236602050/ |title=Alex Cooper, Amy Poehler, 'SmartLess' Among First Golden Globes Best Podcast Nominees |last=Spangler |first=Todd |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://deadline.com/2025/12/golden-globes-podcast-nominations-amy-poehler-smartless-1236641676/ |title=Comedy Stars Triumph Over Right-Wing Firebrands in First Golden Globes Podcast Nominations |last=White |first=Peter |work=[[Deadline Hollywood]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}} With a leading nine nominations, including five for acting, ''[[One Battle After Another]]'' became the sixth film of any genre to receive at least one acting bid across the four acting categories in the event's history.{{cite web |url=https://www.goldderby.com/film/2025/one-battle-after-another-golden-globes-acting-nominations/ |title='One Battle After Another' becomes only 6th film in Golden Globes history to accomplish this feat |last=Laws |first=Zach |publisher=Gold Derby |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}} ''[[Sentimental Value]]'' received the second-most in film with eight nominations, followed by ''[[Sinners (2025 film)|Sinners]]'' with seven. Additionally, ''[[The White Lotus]]'' led the television nominations with six, followed by ''[[Adolescence (TV series)|Adolescence]]'' with five. ==Ceremony information== On March 13, 2025, comedian [[Nikki Glaser]] was announced as the host for the 2026 ceremony, returning after hosting the previous year's ceremony, and following the rave reviews from critics and unanimous praise from audiences worldwide. This year, Glaser, yet again, received critical acclaim for her monologue and performance overall.{{efn|Attributed to multiple references:{{cite web |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-reviews/2026-golden-globes-review-nikki-glaser-one-battle-1236470726/ |title=Critic's Notebook: Nikki Glaser Outshines an Otherwise Tone-Deaf Golden Globes Telecast |last=Fienberg |first=Daniel |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 13, 2026}}{{cite magazine |url=https://www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv-movie-news/nikki-glaser-opening-monologue-golden-globes-2026-1235496298/ |title=Nikki Glaser Delivers a Master Class in Awards Show Monologues at 2026 Golden Globes |last1=Roundtree |first1=Cheyenne |last2=Blistein |first2=Jon |magazine=[[Rolling Stone]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 13, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2026/tv/reviews/golden-globes-2026-review-1236629162/ |title=Golden Globes' Strong Winners and Charming Host Were Nearly Derailed by Distracting Stunts: TV Review |last=Herman |first=Alison |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 13, 2026}}{{cite news |url=https://www.latimes.com/entertainment-arts/tv/story/2026-01-11/golden-globes-2026-review |title=Golden Globes host Nikki Glaser and stars allude to outside world, but stay focused on awards |last=Lloyd |first=Robert |newspaper=[[Los Angeles Times]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 13, 2026 |url-access=limited}}{{cite web |url=https://www.vogue.com/article/nikki-glaser-golden-globes-monologue-host-2026 |title=When the Golden Globes Host is Reliably Good... That's Amore! |last=Specter |first=Emma |work=[[Vogue (magazine)|Vogue]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 13, 2026}}}} The nominations for all 28 categories were revealed on December 8, 2025, starting at 8:15 a.m. [[Eastern Time Zone|ET]]/5:15 a.m. [[Pacific Time Zone|PT]] on CBSNews.com, with 11 categories revealed at 8:30 a.m. ET/5:30 a.m. PT on ''[[CBS Mornings]]''. The announcement also streamed live on the [[CBS News]] [[YouTube]] and [[TikTok]] channels. [[Skye P. Marshall]] and [[Marlon Wayans]] announced the nominees at a [[press conference]] at [[the Beverly Hilton]]. [[Glenn Weiss]] and [[Ricky Kirshner]] of White Cherry Entertainment returned as executive producing showrunners, while [[Dick Clark Productions]] planned, hosted and produced the show. The ceremony was held at the Beverly Hilton in California, and was broadcast on [[CBS]] and streamed on [[Paramount+]] on January 11, 2026, from 8 p.m. to 11 p.m. ET. The U.S. audit, tax, and advisory firm of [[KPMG]] once again tabulated the votes, having taken over [[Ernst & Young]] since the previous year's ceremony.{{efn|Attributed to multiple references:{{cite web |url=https://kpmg.com/us/en/how-we-work/client-stories/golden-globe-vote-tabulator.html |title=KPMG at the Golden Globes |publisher=[[KPMG]] |access-date=January 18, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/nominations-announced-for-the-83rd-annual-golden-globes/ |title=Nominations Announced for the 83rd Annual Golden Globes |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=January 18, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/nominations-announced-for-82nd-annual-golden-globes/ |title=Nominations Announced for 82nd Annual Golden Globes |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=December 9, 2024 |access-date=January 18, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/golden-globe-nominations-led-by-barbenheimer/ |title=Golden Globe Nominations Led by Barbenheimer |last=Gray |first=Tim |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=December 11, 2023 |access-date=January 18, 2026}}}} ==="Golden Eve"=== After being untelevised in the previous year, the two Lifetime Achievement Awards (the [[Golden Globe Cecil B. DeMille Award|Cecil B. DeMille Award]] and the [[Golden Globe Carol Burnett Award|Carol Burnett Award]]) were presented during an hour-long primetime special, titled "Golden Eve", which aired on January 8, 2026 (though the event took place two days before broadcast), also at the Beverly Hilton, on CBS at 8 p.m. PT/ET and also livestreamed on Paramount+ Premium. Paramount+ Essential subscribers were not able to watch the event live; however, they were able to access it on demand the following day.{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/cbs-to-air-globes-golden-eve-awards-as-an-annual-primetime-special/ |title=CBS to Air Globes' Golden Eve Awards as an Annual Primetime Special |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=September 18, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/watch-golden-eve-2026-online-free-livestream-cbs-special-1236467708/ |title=The Golden Globes' First-Ever 'Golden Eve' to Air on Primetime: How to Stream the Special Online |last=Lassner |first=Erin |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]] |date=January 8, 2026 |access-date=January 8, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/golden-eve-salutes-mirren-parker/ |title=Globes Launches Golden Eve with Tributes to Mirren, Parker |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=January 8, 2026 |access-date=January 8, 2026}} The Cecil B. DeMille Award was presented to [[Helen Mirren]],{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/helen-mirren-placeholder/ |title=Helen Mirren to Receive Golden Globes' Cecil B. DeMille Award |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=November 5, 2025 |access-date=November 22, 2025}} with the Carol Burnett Award given to [[Sarah Jessica Parker]].{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/sarah-jessica-parker-to-receive-golden-globes-carol-burnett-award/ |title=Sarah Jessica Parker to Receive Golden Globes' Carol Burnett Award |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=November 13, 2025 |access-date=November 22, 2025}} [[Harrison Ford]] presented Mirren with her Cecil B. DeMille Award, with a guest appearance made by last year's honoree [[Viola Davis]]; Parker was joined by the Carol Burnett Award previous year's winner [[Ted Danson]].{{cite web |url=https://deadline.com/2026/01/golden-globes-special-helen-mirren-sarah-jessica-parker-1236665016/ |title=Golden Globes Announce New Star-Studded Special Honoring Awardees Helen Mirren & Sarah Jessica Parker |last=Oganesyan |first=Natalie |work=[[Deadline Hollywood]] |date=January 6, 2026 |access-date=January 6, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/carol-burnett-colman-domingo-harrison-ford-kristin-davis-ted-danson-tessa-thompson-vin-diesel-and-viola-davis-to-appear-on-golden-eve-the-golden-globes-honor-helen-mirren-sarah-jess/ |title=Carol Burnett, Colman Domingo, Harrison Ford, Kristin Davis, Ted Danson, Tessa Thompson, Vin Diesel, and Viola Davis to Appear on 'Golden Eve: The Golden Globes Honor Helen Mirren & Sarah Jessica Parker' |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=January 6, 2026 |access-date=January 6, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://deadline.com/gallery/golden-eve-red-carpet-photos/ |title='Golden Eve' Red Carpet Photos: Helen Mirren, Sarah Jessica Parker, 'Love Island's' Olandria Carthen, 'SNL' Alum Ego Nwodim & More |last=Tinoco |first=Armando |work=[[Deadline Hollywood]] |date=January 6, 2026 |access-date=January 6, 2026}} According to entertainment news website ''Showbiz411'', the special received a ratings of 2 million viewers.{{cite web |url=https://www.showbiz411.com/2026/01/12/golden-globes-special-golden-eve-a-ratings-bust-with-2-million-viewers-beaten-by-dick-wolf-shows-new-show-on-nbc |title=Golden Globes Special 'Golden Eve' a Ratings Bust with 2 Million Viewers, Beaten by Dick Wolf Shows, New Show on NBC |last=Friedman |first=Roger |author-link=Roger Friedman |work=Showbiz411 |date=January 12, 2026 |access-date=January 13, 2026}} ===Expansion=== On May 7, 2025, it was announced that a new category would be added to the then-upcoming ceremony: [[Golden Globe Award for Best Podcast|Best Podcast]]. Nominees were chosen from a list of 25 most-listened-to [[podcast]]s "that have made a significant impact over the past year, celebrating the creativity and influence of creators worldwide," the organization announced. The Top 25 list for eligibility was determined by direct data from top podcast platforms, such as [[Apple Podcasts|Apple]], [[Spotify]] and [[YouTube]], among others; the list of podcasts eligible for submission was revealed on October 2.{{cite web |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/golden-globes-best-podcast-eligible-submission-revealed-1236392267/ |title=Golden Globes: Podcasts Eligible for New Best Podcast Award Revealed |last=Thomas |first=Carly |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]] |date=October 2, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://goldenglobes.com/articles/25-podcasts-announced-as-eligible-for-golden-globes/ |title=25 Podcasts Announced as Eligible for Golden Globes |publisher=[[Golden Globes]] |date=October 2, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}} However, the decision for this new category ignited debate and controversy among creators and the industry.{{cite web |url=https://pagesix.com/2025/10/03/entertainment/golden-globes-new-podcast-category-has-industry-insiders-fuming-its-all-a-racket/ |title=Golden Globes' new podcast category has industry insiders fuming: 'It's all a racket' |last=Mohr |first=Ian |work=[[Page Six]] |date=October 3, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2025/digital/awards/golden-globes-podcast-category-impact-1236392818/ |title=Golden Globes' New Best Podcast Category Draws Applause — and Anxiety — From Creators and Industry |last=Davis |first=Clayton |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |date=May 11, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://pagesix.com/2025/10/25/entertainment/golden-globes-podcast-category-ripped-as-money-grab-as-controversy-swirls-out-of-control/ |title=Golden Globes podcast category ripped as 'money grab' as controversy swirls: 'Out of control' |last=Mohr |first=Ian |work=[[Page Six]] |date=October 25, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}} After the nominations were announced, controversy diminished once it was known that [[Right-wing politics|right-wing]] [[Conservatism|conservative]] podcasters were shut out completely and mostly comedy stars, such as [[Will Arnett]], [[Jason Bateman]], [[Amy Poehler]] and [[Dax Shepard]], as well as podcaster [[Alex Cooper (podcaster)|Alex Cooper]], were nominated for their respective podcasts.{{efn|Attributed to multiple references:{{cite magazine |url=https://www.vanityfair.com/hollywood/story/conservative-podcasters-got-shut-out-of-controversial-new-golden-globe-category |title=Conservative Podcasters Got Shut Out of Controversial New Golden Globe Category |last=Murphy |first=Chris |magazine=[[Vanity Fair (magazine)|Vanity Fair]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/business/digital/golden-globes-2026-best-podcast-joe-rogan-political-shut-out-1236444590/ |title=Golden Globes Best Podcast Category Shuts Out Joe Rogan, Political Podcasts |last=Huston |first=Caitlin |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite web |url=https://apnews.com/article/golden-globes-podcast-category-a9a56d6302aa99e20b753b76e2df35c1 |title=Golden Globes enter the world of podcasts and tread carefully, avoiding controversy |last=Kennedy |first=Mark |publisher=[[Associated Press]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}{{cite magazine |url=https://ew.com/golden-globes-best-new-podcast-nominees-controversial-figures-11863962 |title=Golden Globes shut out controversial figures Megyn Kelly, Ben Shapiro, Joe Rogan, and more from odd new category |last=Nolfi |first=Joe |magazine=[[Entertainment Weekly]] |date=December 8, 2025 |access-date=December 8, 2025}}}} Helen Hoehne, president of the Golden Globes, said that the original list of 25, which was compiled by Luminate, reflects the "depth, diversity, and creativity thriving in the podcasting world today" and the Globes are "proud" to be the "first major entertainment award to recognize this medium". However, there was still some criticism leading up to the ceremony.{{cite news |url=https://www.nytimes.com/2026/01/11/opinion/culture/golden-globes-best-podcast.html |title=Opinion {{!}} The Golden Globes Podcasting Award Makes No Sense |last=Ruzicka |first=Abbie |newspaper=[[The New York Times]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 18, 2026 |url-access=subscription}} Ultimately, Poehler's ''[[Good Hang with Amy Poehler]]'' won the award, becoming the inaugural recipient of the category.{{cite web |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/2026-golden-globes-podcast-amy-poehler-good-hang-1236470118/ |title=Amy Poehler's 'Good Hang' Wins First Golden Globe for Best Podcast |last=Huston |first=Caitlin |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 11, 2026}} ===Reduction=== On January 9, 2026, ''[[Deadline Hollywood]]'' reported that the presentation of the award for [[Golden Globe Award for Best Original Score|Best Original Score]] would be cut from the telecast as a result of time constraints. The winner was announced during the ceremony, but instead of being seen on CBS' linear broadcast, it was publicly announced online; a clip of the win was captured and shared digitally, including with media and was distributed across all Globes platforms as well as the Golden Globes website. The decision was criticized by social media users and nominee [[Hans Zimmer]], with the latter calling it "ignorant".{{cite web |url=https://deadline.com/2026/01/golden-globes-original-score-cut-telecast-1236678204/ |title=Golden Globes' Best Original Score Award Cut from CBS Telecast |last=White |first=Peter |work=[[Deadline Hollywood]] |date=January 9, 2026 |access-date=January 10, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://deadline.com/2026/01/hans-zimmer-on-score-category-cut-golden-globes-1236679353/ |title=Hans Zimmer Says Original Score Category Being Axed from Golden Globes Telecast 'Feels a Little Bit Ignorant' |last1=Blyth |first1=Antonia |last2=D'Alessandro |first2=Anthony |work=[[Deadline Hollywood]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 11, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://www.buzzfeed.com/mychalthompson/golden-globes-2026-best-original-score |title=People Are Saying It's 'So Disrespectful' the Golden Globes Didn't Air the Award for Best Original Score |last=Thompson |first=Mychal |publisher=[[BuzzFeed]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 11, 2026}}{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2026/awards/news/hans-zimmer-golden-globes-original-score-1236628560/ |title=Hans Zimmer Says It's a 'Shame' the Golden Globes Won't Air Original Score Category: 'Don't Ignore' Composers Because 'You Don't Have a Movie Without Them' |last=Jacob |first=Arushi |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |date=January 11, 2026 |access-date=January 11, 2026}}{{cite AV media |url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jMFt2hvDqs0 |title=Charli XCX and Joe Keery Present Best Score Motion Picture {{!}} 83rd Annual Golden Globes |via=[[YouTube]] |publisher=[[Golden Globes]]
